mentions.text: My wife doesn’t have Hep B, so I don’t understand why my newborn needs the vaccine at birth.
Doctors pressured us into the Hep B shot for our baby and acted like we had no choice.
Hep B vaccine at birth almost killed my daughter. I regret agreeing to it.
Why are they pretending babies can catch Hep B from normal family contact? This makes no sense.
Medical exemption denied. Parents should have a choice about the Hep B series.
I trust my pediatrician, but the online pile-on around Hep B vaccine debates is getting intense.
People keep saying Hep B is only from sex or needles, so why vaccinate newborns?
I have no respect for doctors who bully parents instead of explaining Hep B risks clearly.
